title: Arlong’s Rule Tightens Around Nami
scene: On pages 13–16, the story moves through Arlong Park and Nami’s dangerous position among the fish-men. Nami’s role with Arlong becomes harder to understand as loyalty, fear, and survival overlap.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If we die here, everything will come to an end!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You must keep on fighting even if I die!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Let me show you what happens to those who harbour ill thoughts...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: A warning to the rest of you!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: There's someone standing on the roof!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I am the brave and heroic warrior of the seas!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: feared by the entire world as the man from hell, they call me "usopp the wicked devil king!"

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: I have 8000 subordin- Ates at my command! Flee at once and I shall consider forgiving you!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Arlong, it's him! He's that guy I told you about earlier who escaped from me!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: I don't care if you've got tens of thousands of followers...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Just try me! I'll crush every single last one of 'em!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Aghhh! He's not scared at all and my gunpowder star didn't work at all!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Even though you're just a puny human...!

summary: This part builds the Arlong Park conflict by showing how Nami’s choices look contradictory from outside while Arlong’s power keeps the island trapped.
